name: Tran Tuan Tu
summary: Final-year Electronics and Telecommunications Engineering student at Hanoi University of Science and Technology (HUST) with strong academic performance and a demonstrated focus on backend software development. Hands-on experience in building and deploying IoT systems, RESTful APIs, and automation tools using Python, TypeScript, and C++. Seeking to specialize in large-scale systems and eager to secure a Cloud Engineer, DevOps, or Backend Developer role to contribute to scalable, containerized infrastructure and modern cloud technologies.

experience.title: Backend Developer Intern
details: Developed core microservices for fintech platform finone.vn using NestJS and TypeScript, adhering to architectural patterns for scalability and security.
Implemented backend services for authentication and transaction processing.
Participated in agile workflow, conducted peer code reviews, and used Git for version control.
Designed modular database schemas for core services to ensure scalability.
Containerized backend services using Docker for consistent deployment.
Deployed multi-platform AI-powered chatbot (Web, Messenger, Zalo, Instagram) with scripted conversations and routing logic.

education.school: Hanoi University of Science and Technology (HUST)
education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Electronics and Telecommunications
details: Relevant Coursework: Microprocessor and Microcontroller Systems, Signal and Systems, Machine Learning Fundamentals, Digital Logic Design, Data Structures and Algorithms, Internet of Things (Samsung Innovation Campus), Digital Communication.

projects.title: Self-Hosting Server on Linux
projects.desc: Deployed a personal homelab on a headless Debian server to self-host services including Pi-hole, Nextcloud, and Portainer. Managed environment via SSH, secured network/firewall, containerized apps with Docker Compose, and configured Nginx reverse proxy with SSL.

projects.title: Smart Storage IoT System – Samsung Innovation Campus
projects.desc: Led backend development for an 8-member team to build an IoT system with real-time sensor data processing and device actuation. Built REST APIs with Flask, MQTT broker with Mosquitto, SQLAlchemy/SQLite for storage, JWT auth, and Dockerized all backend services.

projects.title: Torrent Downloader and Player
projects.desc: Developed a desktop movie manager in Python with PySide6 (MVC pattern). Integrated qbittorrent API for direct downloads, SQLite for storage, external API for metadata/posters, and embedded VLC player for playback.

projects.title: Natural Disaster Management Website
projects.desc: Built a website for monitoring and managing disaster data to enable efficient response and resource allocation.

projects.title: Visualization of DFS, BFS, and Dijkstra Algorithms
projects.desc: C++ desktop app using SFML to visually demonstrate graph traversal and shortest path algorithms with interactive grid UI.

projects.title: Speed Measurement Device with Arduino Uno
projects.desc: Arduino-based real-time speed measurement device with LCD display, timer control buttons, and Proteus simulation.
